title: Coming to New Zealand on the Parent Resident Visa :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Coming to New Zealand on the Parent Resident Visa
Learn about how to come to New Zealand on the Parent Resident Visa. Find out about the expression of interest (EOI) process and who can sponsor you.
- Parent Resident Visa sponsor income requirements If your child earns enough and is a New Zealand resident or citizen, they may be able to help you come to New Zealand on the Parent Resident Visa.

## Parent Resident Visa sponsor income requirements
If your child earns enough and is a New Zealand resident or citizen, they may be able to help you come to New Zealand on the Parent Resident Visa.
- Parent Resident Visa expression of interest form Use this form to register online for the Parent Resident Visa ballot.

## Parent Resident Visa expression of interest form
Use this form to register online for the Parent Resident Visa ballot.
- Parent Resident Visa expression of interest (EOI) selection process When you submit your Parent Resident Visa EOI it goes into a ballot. If we select your EOI, we may invite you to apply for residence. Find out how the EOI and application process works.

## Parent Resident Visa expression of interest (EOI) selection process
When you submit your Parent Resident Visa EOI it goes into a ballot. If we select your EOI, we may invite you to apply for residence. Find out how the EOI and application process works.
- Update or withdraw your Parent Resident Visa expression of interest (EOI) If you made an expression of interest (EOI) for the Parent Resident Visa you can update or withdraw it.

## Update or withdraw your Parent Resident Visa expression of interest (EOI)
If you made an expression of interest (EOI) for the Parent Resident Visa you can update or withdraw it.
- Parent Resident Visa successful expressions of interest (EOIs) Find out which EOIs for the Parent Resident Visa were successful in the ballot.

## Parent Resident Visa successful expressions of interest (EOIs)
Find out which EOIs for the Parent Resident Visa were successful in the ballot.
